name: passthrough
description: Default algorithm that passes data through unchanged. Use this when no transformation is needed between collection and transfer.
author: hermes-core

log_passthrough.title: Log Data Passthrough
log_passthrough.description: If true, logs a summary of data passing through (useful for debugging).

log_passthrough.ui:help: Enable for debugging to see what data passes through

outputSchema.description: Same structure as input — data is passed through unchanged.
